creator: vadim.k@sapiens.com
text:
I have Compaq ProLiant 3000 - e39 (04/19/2000)
with Wide-Ultra 10k SCSI-3 9.1 GB drive and one Wide-Ultra2 SCSI 9.1 GB drive.

The First Drive is not recognized by fbsd, but second one is.
Theie is no difference if I mix them or not.

The First drive specification:
Capacity 9100.0 MB 
Height 1 in/25.4 mm 
 Width 4.0 in/101.6 mm 
  Interface Wide Ultra3 SCSI 
  Transfer Rate Synchronous 
(Maximum) 160 MB/s 
  Seek Time 
(typical reads, including settling) Single Track  0.9 ms 
 Average  5.0 ms 
  Full-Stroke 12 ms 
  Rotational Speed 10,000 rpm 
  Physical Configuration Bytes/Sector 512 
   Logical Blocks 17,773,524 
  Operating Temperature 50° to 95° F/10° to 35° C 

 
The second drive  spacification:

Table 5-9. 9.1 GB Wide-Ultra SCSI Drives Specifications
===========================================================================
Capacity                                 9100.0 MB
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
Height                                   Half
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
Size                                     3.5-inch
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
Interface                                Wide-Ultra SCSI
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
Transfer Rate                            40 MB/s
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
Sector Interleave                        1:1
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
Seek Times (typical, including
settling):
  Single Track                           1.0 ms
  Average                                7.9 ms
  Full Stroke                            19.0 ms
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
Rotational Speed                         7200 RPM
===========================================================================
